assertions.evidence: report.json contains all required fields: timestamp (str), mode ('dry-run'), sourceRoot (str), targetRoot (str), sourceType ('openclaw'), summary object with migrated(3)/archived(0)/skipped(11)/conflict(0)/error(0)/total(14) (all int), items (array of 14)
assertions.details: Parsed report.json and verified every required field exists with correct types

assertions.evidence: summary.md contains sections: '## Summary', '## Migrated Items', '## Skipped Items', '## Next Steps'. Content is human-readable markdown with itemized lists.
assertions.details: Read summary.md and verified all required sections present

assertions.evidence: Created target SOUL.md with '# Old SOUL content - should be backed up', ran --source hermes --execute --overwrite. Original SOUL.md replaced with hermes content. Backup found at output/backups/SOUL.md containing the original '# Old SOUL content - should be backed up'. Also .env backup created at output/backups/external/.
assertions.details: Verified backup file exists with correct original content after overwrite

assertions.evidence: MIGRATION_NOTES.md contains '## Manual Review Required' section listing skipped/conflicted items with status and reasons, and '## Action Items' section with actionable checklist items.
assertions.details: Read MIGRATION_NOTES.md and verified manual review and action items sections
